# Pull Request Template
Use this template for all pull requests to ensure consistency and completeness.

## Description
Provide a brief description of the changes made in this pull request and the problem it solves. Include any relevant context or background information.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (changes to documentation only)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues or pull requests that this PR addresses.
- Closes #XXX
- Related to #YYY

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## Environment Variables
List any new environment variables that are required for this change, along with a brief description of their purpose.
- `NEW_ENV_VAR`: Description of what this variable does and how to set it.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Include any relevant screenshots or screen recordings that demonstrate the changes made in this pull request. 

## Additional Context
Provide any additional context or information that may be relevant to reviewers, such as design decisions, trade-offs, or future work that may be needed.
